package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsSplitSameInputMultipleTimes() string {
    ruleID := "strings_split_same_input_multiple_times"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "The same string input is passed through strings.Split* or strings.Fields* helpers multiple times in one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
